subcodes.first_line: The lamentation of God hath verily been raised in truth from the Manifestation of His Self, Who hath fallen beneath the claws of hatred and was not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حنین الله قد ارتفع بالحق من مظهر نفسه الذی وقع تحت مخالیب البغضا و لم یکن
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement
